---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the installer
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Run `...` with `...`
2. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add log output. **Make sure no secrets (passwords, tokens, connection strings) are included.** The installer redacts known secrets, but double-check before pasting.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Architecture: [e.g. x86_64, ARM64]
- Installer version: [run `calagopus-installer version` or `bash src/installer.sh --version`]
- Deploy mode: [docker / native]
- Channel: [stable / beta / nightly]
- Calagopus Panel version: [if known]
- Calagopus Wings version: [if known]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
